Description
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls
JavaFX controls and fluent builders for dialogs and panes.

    Classes in com.dua3.utility.fx.controls that implement ColumnDef
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ColumnDefGeneric<S,T>
    Represents a generic column definition intended for use in tabular data structures or grids.
    final class 
    ColumnDefText<S,T>
    Represents the definition of a column in a TableView.

    TableViews.newTableView(SequencedCollection<? extends ColumnDef<S,?>> columns, TableViewOptions options, SequencedCollection<? extends S> initialItems)
